title: I LUNG NUAM HI, JESUH MUANG LENG

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: I lung nuam hi Jesuh muang leng
A ma hong gen bang um leng
A ma hong thu ciam na muang
leng
Topa’ hong cih na thei leng

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Jesuh Jesuh ke’n ka muang hi
A
muan huai na thei zo ing
Jesuh Jesuh man pha Jesuh
A mah muang sem sem nuam
ing

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: I lung nuam hi Jesuh muang leng
Hong sap na a Si muang leng
Hong dam hong
siang sak thei A’ Si
Sung ah upna tawh bual leng

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: I lung nuam hi Jesuh muang
leng
Mawh na pum pi nu sia leng
Nun tak lung nop tawl dam nuam na
Jesuh khut tung pan saang
leng

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: Jesuh kong muan’ theih ka nuam hi
A manpha Lawmpa Na hi
Hong honpa aw
a tawp dong in
Nong om pih ding ka thei hi
